freshness.help: Freshness is based on the selected saved run, not live tick data.
freshness.label: old

data_quality.note: rows with critical sanity flags are excluded from factor ranking

long_short_ratio.note: CoinGlass global + top-trader long/short account ratio

technicals.note: CoinGlass futures price OHLC technical indicators

reason_parts.help: Spot or mark price change over the last 24 hours.
reason_parts.label: 24h

reason_parts.help: Open-interest change over the last 24 hours; rising OI means more futures positioning.
reason_parts.label: OI 24h

reason_parts.help: Perpetual funding rate; positive usually means longs pay shorts, negative means shorts pay longs.
reason_parts.label: Funding

reason_parts.help: Long/short volume ratio; above 1 leans long, below 1 leans short.
reason_parts.label: L/S

reason_parts.label: Tech

reason_parts.help: 14-period RSI on the configured CoinGlass candle interval.
